targets.notes: Goal to reach net-zero emissions across all operations and value chain by 2030, neutralizing remaining emissions with nature-based and technology-based carbon removal solutions.
targets.title: Net-zero emissions across operations and value chain by 2030

targets.boundary: Combined Scope 1, Scope 2 (market-based), and Scope 3 emissions
targets.notes: The company has formally committed to the Science Based Targets initiative to validate this absolute emissions reduction target.
targets.title: 50% absolute GHG emissions reduction by 2030 vs 2019
